feedback.text: Considering we pay for the device and the software i consider we have a right to do whatever we want on the softwate or the hardware. guarantee can be voided, it's ok. Also it should be repairable by design, like a minum repairability at 7 or 8/10 imagine buying a laptop and not be able to install linux, upgrade the RAM or the storage. it is disatrous to let big company own the life of the physical device we bought
